name: edge-agents
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for the Edge specialist-agent workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-dir workflows for bounded research and repo work.
interface.longDescription: Project-local Codex plugin for Edge. It packages the existing agent specifications under agents/ into reusable Codex skills for repo orientation, coordination, diagnosis, bounded hypothesis formulation, and proposal compilation.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose an Edge run using the analyst workflow.
Turn an analyst report into bounded hypotheses.
Compile a mechanism hypothesis into proposal YAML.
